emails.subject: Canada Work Report
emails.body: Do you have copies of the Alberta and British Columbia Acts? I know they are less stringent than the US rules, but I don't know the exact levels. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/09/2001 05:30 PM Wendy Conwell@ENRON 03/09/2001 05:12 PM
